meanings.definition: represent the effect of shade or shadow on
protect from light, heat, or view
examples: Shade your eyes when you step out into the bright sunlight

meanings.definition: pass from one quality such as color to another by a slight degree
examples: the butterfly wings shade to yellow

meanings.definition: protected from heat and light with shade or shadow; ; - Alexander Pope
examples: o'er the shaded billows rushed the night

meanings.definition: (of pictures or drawings) drawn or painted with degrees or gradations of shadow
examples: the shaded areas of the face seemed to recede
